'''washowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactogenicity|reactogenicity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactogenicity|reactogenicity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| washowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæsheweth|wæsheweth]] || [[word:wæshewej|wæshewej]] || [[word:wæshewesh|wæshewesh]] || [[word:wæshewe|wæshewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:washoshowoth|washoshowoth]] || [[word:washoshowoj|washoshowoj]] || [[word:washoshowosh|washoshowosh]] || [[word:washoshowo|washoshowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:washowoth|washowoth]] || [[word:washowoj|washowoj]] || [[word:washowosh|washowosh]] || [[word:washowo|washowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:washofwoth|washofwoth]] || [[word:washofwoj|washofwoj]] || [[word:washofwosh|washofwosh]] || [[word:washofwof|washofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:washowotho|washowotho]] || [[word:washowojo|washowojo]] || [[word:washowosho|washowosho]] || [[word:washowoko|washowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:washowoth|washowoth]] || [[word:washowoj|washowoj]] || [[word:washowosh|washowosh]] || [[word:washowo|washowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:washowothol|washowothol]] || [[word:washowojol|washowojol]] || [[word:washowoshol|washowoshol]] || [[word:washowokol|washowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:washowothotho|washowothotho]] || [[word:washowojojo|washowojojo]] || [[word:washowoshosho|washowoshosho]] || [[word:washowoko|washowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:washowothon|washowothon]] || [[word:washowojon|washowojon]] || [[word:washowoshon|washowoshon]] || [[word:washowokon|washowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:washowothoro|washowothoro]] || [[word:washowojoro|washowojoro]] || [[word:washowoshoro|washowoshoro]] || [[word:washowokoro|washowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
